entities.name: clarity
entities.context: Writing principle: one main idea per sentence

entities.name: authenticity
entities.context: Writing principle: sounds natural and human

entities.name: action_orientation
entities.context: Writing principle: clear next steps when applicable

entities.name: scanability
entities.context: Writing principle: can grasp key points in 30 seconds

entities.name: corporate_speak
entities.context: Anti-pattern: jargon like leverage, synergy, circle back

entities.name: hedge_words
entities.context: Anti-pattern: vague intensifiers like very, really, quite

entities.name: unclear_action
entities.context: Anti-pattern: vague commitments without specific dates

entities.name: Operator
entities.context: Persona for file organization and workflow execution

entities.name: Strategist
entities.context: Persona for strategic framing and positioning

entities.name: Writer
entities.context: Persona for clear content: emails, docs, posts, memos

relationships.context: Core writing principle for Writer persona
Core writing principle for Writer persona
Core writing principle for Writer persona
Core writing principle for Writer persona
Route to Operator when stuck on file organization
Route to Strategist for strategic framing
Route to Teacher for technical explanations
Route to Architect for content system design
Builder handles technical implementation instead of Writer
Both are anti-patterns to avoid in writing
